title: astraea manihot
intro: Astraea manihot, also known as the Manihot or Jaraguá, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in Brazil and other parts of South America. The medicinal properties of Astraea manihot lie in its leaves, which contain anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Astraea manihot include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Astraea manihot is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
